body_txt: This character always refers to their peers by their full given name, not their more commonly used nickname or diminutive form. It's not always a sign of aloofness, and they might even be the person's close friend, however, for whatever reason, they don't use nicknames. This is usually a sign of a serious or formal character. It might also signify either an age gap between characters or a professionalism between them. A Sub-Trope of Spock Speak . Compare to Full-Name Basis ; You Called Me "X"; It Must Be Serious ; Full-Name Ultimatum ; First-Name Ultimatum , and Hates Being Nicknamed . Contrast with The Nicknamer .
